name: Bourbon Marinade (All-purpose)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a large glass or earthenware bowl until well blended.
2. Add meat to marinade.
3. Refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight, turning the mixture 4 times.
(Makes 6-1/2 to 7 cups)
This makes enough to marinate 6-7 lbs of any big or small game meat.
